summary: Iteration 187 testing complete: Three Avenues reorganization (Material/Living/Ancestral), Education Packs with dynamic pricing, Resonance Builds crafting system. All 19 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified: Three Avenues accordion panels, pillar buttons, panel components (EBikePanel, BotanicalLabPanel, HistoryPanel), Education Packs toggles, and Resonance Builds panel all working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Three Avenues structure correctly implemented: Material (ebike+economy), Living (botanical+biometrics+art), Ancestral (history+math+thought)
Education Packs endpoint returns 9 packs with avenue filter working correctly
Dynamic pricing formula implemented: high scaling = base * (1 + level), flat = base, moderate = base * (1 + level * 0.3), milestone = base * (1 + level // 3)
Resonance Builds crafting system returns 3 builds with proper ownership/crafting status
Widget overlap fix verified: FloatingAssistant at bottom-[72px] and QuickMeditationWidget at bottom-6 (24px) - no overlap
All previous Science/History endpoints still working (botanical-lab, ebike/sims, history-modules, geology, economy/shop)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 187 Three Avenues features all working. Test user has: 314 Resonance, 203 Kinetic Dust, 62 Science Resonance, Seeker tier. The Mastery Avenues page at /mastery-avenues shows Three Avenues of Flow with Material/Living/Ancestral accordions. Each avenue expands to show pillar buttons. Education Packs are integrated within each avenue. Resonance Builds panel shows 3 builds (Kinetic Amplifier, Zen Flow, Chrono-Alchemist). Auth flow: use /auth page, dismiss trial modal with 'Continue with free plan'.

backend_apis.GET /api/science-history/economy/builds: Returns 3 Resonance Builds with crafting requirements
backend_apis.POST /api/science-history/economy/craft-: Crafts build (fails if items not owned)

frontend_pages.global_tickers: Shows Resonance, Kinetic Dust, Sci Resonance, Tier
frontend_pages.avenue_material: Glassmorphism accordion panel with E-Bike + Economy pillars
frontend_pages.avenue_living: Glassmorphism accordion panel with Botanical + Biometrics + Art pillars
frontend_pages.avenue_ancestral: Glassmorphism accordion panel with History + Math + Thought pillars
frontend_pages.ebike_panel: Loads with sliders when E-Bike pillar clicked
frontend_pages.botanical_lab_panel: Loads with simulations when Botanical pillar clicked
frontend_pages.history_panel: Loads with modules when History pillar clicked

widget_overlap_fix.overlap_status: NO OVERLAP - FloatingAssistant is 72px from bottom, QuickMeditation is 24px from bottom
